tweets.text: Special Rep. Biegun at @StanfordSAPARC: It is this promise of closing the door on 70 years of war & hostility on Korean Peninsula that led Pres. Trump to Singapore last June. The U.S. is ready to turn vision outlined by @realDonaldTrump & Chairman Kim at Singapore into reality. https://t.co/aUdaWk7cYp

Special Representative Biegun at @StanfordSAPARC: President @realDonaldTrump has made clear that should #NorthKorea follow through on Chairman Kim’s commitment to complete denuclearization, the United States will, in return, exceed anything previously thought possible. https://t.co/OkV9kMGQSx
Special Representative Biegun at @StanfordSAPARC: While there is much work still to do, we should not ignore the progress we have had to date. https://t.co/TQrWcZIhqR

Special Representative Biegun at @StanfordSAPARC: President @realDonaldTrump and Chairman Kim have decided to pursue a top-down approach with a breadth of actions that—if successful—will fundamentally transform relations between our two nations. https://t.co/7U5tQkytuD

Live now! Special Representative for #NorthKorea Stephen Biegun gives remarks at @Stanford University’s @StanfordSAPARC on U.S. efforts towards the final, fully verified denuclearization of the #DPRK. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.

⚡️On Jan. 23, @POTUS recognized @JGuaido as interim President of #Venezuela. The U.S. stands w/the democratically elected @AsambleaVE & the people of Venezuela as they peacefully restore constitutional order & democracy to their country.  #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/HoyGf9gpGN

Under Secretary David Hale co-chaired the 12th U.S.-#Canada High-Level Policy Review Group with Canadian Assistant Deputy Minister Mark Gwozdecky. Canada is a close ally and partner of the U.S. on the most pressing global issues, including #Venezuela, #Iran, and #NorthKorea. https://t.co/bvRKU0DtHd
Watch @SecPompeo discuss the situation in #Venezuela, #DPRK, and more with @seanhannity of @FoxNews. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/1UdJGjlHR1

The U.S. continues to support the democratic aspirations of the Venezuelan people through diplomatic engagement, economic sanctions, and humanitarian assistance. https://t.co/m6wHHkEJXh #EstamosUnidosVE
In February, @VP Pence will travel to #Poland for the Ministerial to Promote a Future of Peace and Security in the Middle East and to #Germany for the @MunSecConf. https://t.co/FzWPmI7h6H #MSC2019
.@SecPompeo welcomes the Foreign Minister of #Australia @MarisePayne to the State Department. @USAembassyinOZ @AusintheUS https://t.co/8TNpfo9jvy

.@SecPompeo will host meetings with the foreign ministers of @coalition on Feb. 6 in Washington. Ministers will discuss the next phase of the campaign in #Iraq and #Syria, as well as important next steps in degrading ISIS’s global networks and affiliates. https://t.co/lBwYpvLB19

The U.S. and #Algeria convened the fourth session of the Strategic Dialogue today. @SecPompeo and @Messahel_MAE discussed areas for sustained cooperation, including regional stability, economic engagement and trade, and cultural and educational programs. https://t.co/7aesPx8OTD https://t.co/i4WZEmXj7j

The U.S. sanctioned @PDVSA, state-owned oil company used by corrupt, socialist Maduro regime to enrich themselves at expense of the long-suffering Venezuelan people. These sanctions do not target innocent Venezuelans or humanitarian aid. https://t.co/jZWMJJmtF5 #EstamosUnidosVE
This morning, @SecPompeo welcomed #Algeria’s Foreign Minister @Messahel_MAE to the State Department. @AlgeriaMFA @USEmbAlgiers @AlgerianIn https://t.co/tLgDAKOrKS

@stevenmnuchin1: @USTreasury took action against #Venezuela’s state-owned oil company PsVSA to help prevent the further diversion of Venezuela's assets by former President Maduro. The U.S. is holding accountable those responsible for Venezuela's tragic decline. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/9FBIgS8tR0

@AmbJohnBolton: I call on all responsible nations to recognize interim President Guaidó immediately. Maduro has made clear he will not recognize Guaidó or call for new elections. Now is the time to stand for democracy and prosperity in #Venezuela. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/mnoaPneA8y

On January 25, the U.S. accepted interim President @jguaido’s designation of @carlosvecchio as Chargé d’Affaires of the Government of #Venezuela. Mr. Vecchio met w/ Under Secretary Hale & @WHAAsstSecty, who reaffirmed U.S. support for Guaido’s interim leadership. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/RZxJc5YjEm

Following the #UNSC session on #Venezuela, @SecPompeo spoke to the media to emphasize U.S. support for the Venezuelan people as they restore democracy in their nation. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/FRdGkdxJi2 https://t.co/gV8375nhIB

In his remarks at #UNSC, @SecPompeo called on all members of the Security Council to support #Venezuela’s democratic transition and interim President Guaido’s role in it. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/IChCpAQaMv https://t.co/uCDHtmlqS4
.@SecPompeo spoke before a #UNSC session this morning on the importance of addressing the situation in #Venezuela. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/LjOShGN6dC https://t.co/5FXJt7zguO
Following his remarks this morning at a @UN Security Council meeting on #Venezuela, @SecPompeo spoke to the media. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/er3jNpgsLD
Coming up shortly, @SecPompeo delivers remarks to the media from @UN in New York. Watch live here or at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz .
Live now: @SecPompeo delivers remarks to the media, from @UN in New York. https://t.co/FqDCt99fCp
Coming up at approximately 10:35am EST, @SecPompeo delivers remarks to the media from @UN in New York. Watch live here or at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.
.@SecPompeo: No regime has done more to sustain the nightmarish condition of the #Venezuelan people than the regime in Havana. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/n2BRgDNJUL

.@SecPompeo: Now it is time for every other nation to pick a side. No more delays, no more games. Either you stand with the forces of freedom, or you’re in league with Maduro and his mayhem. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/QRpXqdN07V

.@SecPompeo: The U.S. is helping to recover a bright future for #Venezuela. We’re here to urge all nations to support the democratic aspirations of the Venezuelan people as they try to free themselves from former president Maduro’s illegitimate mafia state. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/xvIlziWBRY
.@SecPompeo: Maduro has reduced ordinary #Venezuelans, who once lived in prosperity, to rooting through dumpsters to find something to eat. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/hvpV7dxZE4
.@SecPompeo speaks at the @UN Security Council about the importance of a session on #Venezuela. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/IXVXz9rcDO
Live now: @SecPompeo delivers remarks at @UN Security Council Session on #Venezuela. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/tYsbRwP4KQ
Live now: @SecPompeo delivers remarks at @UN Security Council Session on #Venezuela. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/FYfllDf5jU
Coming up at approximately 9:30am EST, @SecPompeo delivers remarks at @UN Security Council Session on #Venezuela. Watch live here or at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. #EstamosUnidosVE
At approximately 9am EST, @SecPompeo delivers remarks at @UN Security Council Session on #Venezuela. Watch live here or at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. #EstamosUnidosVE
Live now! @SecPompeo delivers remarks on #Venezuela to the media. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/pvdHMI4ZEU
Today, @SecPompeo will deliver remarks to the media on #Venezuela at 4:30 p.m. ET. Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. #EstamosUnidosVE

.@SecPompeo: As a friend of the people of #Venezuela, we stand ready to help them begin process of rebuilding their country & econ. from destruction wrought by criminally incompetent & illegitimate Maduro regime. History will remember whether we help them or not. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/xxAF6twLVP
.@SecPompeo: Today, I am announcing that the United States is ready to provide more than $20 million in humanitarian assistance to the people of #Venezuela. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/mHkkyTbXt1

.@SecPompeo: The U.S. is a friend of #Venezuela and of the Venezuelan people. We have watched Venezuelans suffer for far too long. We know what they know, that the tyranny of the now defunct Maduro regime has for far too long choked the country and its citizens. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/WjVPbETBHN

Today, @SecPompeo announced U.S. is ready to provide more than $20 million in humanitarian aid to the people of #Venezuela as they struggle to cope with food and medicine shortages and the other dire impacts of their country’s political & economic crisis. https://t.co/ZckLjEi5n8
Today, @SecPompeo welcomed #UK’s Foreign Secretary @Jeremy_Hunt to the State Department. @foreignoffice @USAinUK @UKinUSA https://t.co/iMf2O0hxCn

.@SecPompeo: We call on all our partners and responsible @OAS_official member states to show leadership, and pledge support for #Venezuela’s democratic transition and for interim President @JGuaido's pivotal role in it...History will remember whether we help them or not. https://t.co/bysT6MytMZ

.@SecPompeo at @OAS_official: Today I am announcing U.S. is ready to provide more than $20 million in humanitarian aid to the people of #Venezuela. The funds are to help them cope w/severe food & medicine shortages & other dire impacts of their country’s political & econ. crisis. https://t.co/gXlzU7EkGs

.@SecPompeo at @OAS_official: The regime of former president Nicolas Maduro is illegitimate. His regime is morally bankrupt, it is economically incompetent, and it is profoundly corrupt. It is undemocratic to the core. #Venezuela https://t.co/MrjDZy8ads

.@SecPompeo: All @OAS_official member states must align themselves with democracy and respect the rule of law. All member states who have committed to uphold the Inter-American Democratic Charter must now recognize interim President @JGuaido. https://t.co/pMT2B2y5ux
.@SecPompeo will deliver remarks at a special meeting of the Permanent Council, at the @OAS_official at 11:15 a.m. ET. Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.
Watch @SecPompeo's interview with @MarthaMacCallum of @FoxNews: https://t.co/Ux9uarJZEF https://t.co/5IKEFqDA0J
This afternoon, @SecPompeo welcomed #Germany’s Foreign Minister @HeikoMaas to the State Department. @GermanyDiplo @usbotschaft @GermanyinUSA https://t.co/4VHGjdssyB

.@SecPompeo to @wef: We face many new threats from #NorthKorea to #Iran to #China to radical Islam. In all these areas we are making progress. None of this progress could have happened without coalitions in which America plays a central role. #wef19 https://t.co/nsDqpYDq8l

.@SecPompeo to @wef: This economic blueprint – low taxes, streamlined regulations, and trade reform – can work for you and your countries as well. The time is now to adopt these policies. #wef19 https://t.co/7w5DPyLc1m

.@SecPompeo to @wef: Strong borders are key to strong nations. This is how we keep our people safe and protect our sovereignty. Sturdy alliances built on key principles are key to shared security. #wef19 https://t.co/PK2VnZHBo7
Live now! @SecPompeo delivers remarks to the @wef. #wef19 https://t.co/UzGK3hEIpH
.@SecPompeo will deliver remarks via video conference to the @wef at 10:00 a.m. ET. Watch live here on Twitter or at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. #wef19

"The United States under @realDonaldTrump has reasserted its traditional role as a force for good in this region, because we’ve learned from our mistakes. We have rediscovered our voice. We have rebuilt our relationships." -- @SecPompeo in #Egypt https://t.co/AygT1QjX9L https://t.co/zcAFNyoJp6
